page: Amazon Web Services c9g.8xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. This instance features 32 dedicated physical cores on the arm64 architecture, running at a clock speed of 2.8 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, each vCPU maps to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from simultaneous multithreading.

The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 17 Gbps, managed through the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Operating on the arm64 architecture requires software compatibility verification, as legacy x86-64 binaries will not run natively. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration limits its utility for heavy database caching or machine learning training. However, the high physical core count and dedicated CPU allocation make it suitable for compute-heavy workloads such as distributed analytics, batch processing, and containerized microservices.
description: Amazon Web Services c9g.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by AWS Graviton processors on the arm64 architecture. Operating at 2.8 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation without simultaneous multithreading. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core, and relies on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 17 Gbps. Given its high physical core density and compute-to-memory ratio, the c9g.8xlarge is designed for compute-intensive workloads such as batch processing, distributed analytics, and containerized web services that benefit from dedicated arm64 execution resources.

tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and sixty-four gigabytes of memory for intensive processing workloads.
